notes: AC2's contribution is correct and design-guide-compliant. POST validation re-renders the form with the submitted title preserved (AC2 criterion: 'both fields' satisfied because an empty description IS the entered value). Error state uses role='alert', class='field-error' with #FF3621 text and class='input-error' with red border, satisfying design-guide.md User Feedback ('No silent failures', inline error under field, red border, error color text). The architectural boundary concern (all logic in app/main.py vs routes/bugs module per architecture.md) was already flagged in the AC1 verdict and is a pending refactor; no new violation is introduced by AC2. No new design token or layer issues warrant a second refactor cycle here.
